title: Pod Quadlet can't configure `podman pod stop --time`
body:
### Feature request description

Container quadlets allow configuring a `StopTimeout`, the "almost" equivalent `podman pod stop --time` is not configurable via a `.pod` file.

### Suggest potential solution

Support a new `[Pod]` section option `StopTimeout` or a different name.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

No

### Additional context

I was looking for this option for our CI tests, but in the end didn't require it as the issue was not setting a `StopTimeout` for my test containers.

comments.body:
@jelly yes, you are correct. Currently this value is hard coded: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/167102951749ebe140de76bd049a4df53f437a7c/pkg/systemd/quadlet/quadlet.go#L1545
Care to open a PR?
I'd be happy to help with this if you're looking for contributors!
